title: The Cat’s Maew: Thai Treatise on Auspicious Felines (19th Century)
summary: A manuscript that pairs illustrations of cats with poetic descriptions and notes on what mystical benefits their owners might hope to accrue.
full_text:
Enjoyed this piece? We need your help to keep publishing.
